## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Blue J Legal to discuss potential partnership for AI-powered SEO and GEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blue J Legal is in a period of hyper-growth, recently raised Series D funding, and experiencing high demand for their AI-powered tax research solutions](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Blue J currently lacks a robust SEO/GEO strategy, with marketing efforts primarily focused on partner channels](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end SEO/GEO services, including strategy, content creation, LLM visibility, and analytics, powered by AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in a follow-up meeting with additional team members to explore partnership possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

## Topics

### Blue J Legal's Current Situation

  - [9 months into building marketing function from ground up](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [No existing SEO strategy or paid ads; focus has been on events and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Recently hired head of digital acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Launching an answer library for most-asked tax questions](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Experiencing success across all segments, from Big Four firms to sole practitioners](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Category leader in AI tax research, gaining momentum and replacing incumbent solutions](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### GrowthX's Offerings and Approach

  - [End-to-end SEO/GEO services: strategy, publishing, LLM visibility, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for content creation, combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, audience-first content that benefits both SEO and GEO](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Experience with technical and specialized content across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Comprehensive process including strategy sprints, persona development, and content roadmapping](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Daily publishing capabilities for clients](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

### Content Creation and Quality Assurance

  - [AI workflows for brief generation, research, fact-checking, and expert review simulation](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Use of multiple research tools and sources (e.g., Perplexity, GPT, CLAWD)](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Human experts in the loop for content review and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Client team involvement in content approval before staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)

### Measurement and Analytics

  - [Tracking improvements in LLM visibility and search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Monitoring organic traffic growth and conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Detailed discussion on measurement capabilities proposed for follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Leveraging Blue J's CEO's expertise for content creation and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Developing a comprehensive content strategy across various tax-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Improving Blue J's visibility in AI-powered search results for tax research solutions](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to follow up via email with additional meeting time options](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting with GrowthX's CEO Marcel, Blue J's head of content, and head of acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [GrowthX to send additional resources for Blue J team to review](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Consider potential one-on-one connections between team members before the group call](https://fathom.video/share/BFaA3vzZeagv6jVX24DxK1sLhXQ12vRx?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
